name: PM-KISAN (Pradhan Mantri Kisan Samman Nidhi)
description: Income support of ₹6,000/year (₹2,000 every 4 months) directly transferred to bank accounts of eligible farmer families.
benefits: ₹6,000/year in 3 installments of ₹2,000 via Direct Benefit Transfer (DBT).
application_process: Apply via PM-KISAN portal, Common Service Centre (CSC), or local Patwari/Revenue officer. Self-registration possible at pmkisan.gov.in.

name: Ayushman Bharat - PM Jan Arogya Yojana (PMJAY)
description: Health insurance cover of ₹5 lakh per family per year for secondary and tertiary hospitalization.
benefits: Cashless and paperless treatment up to ₹5,00,000 per family per year at empanelled hospitals.
application_process: Check eligibility at pmjay.gov.in or via Ayushman card kiosks/CSC. Get Ayushman Card made at nearby empanelled hospital or CSC.

name: Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana - Gramin (PMAY-G)
description: Financial assistance to build a pucca house for rural families without proper housing.
benefits: ₹1.20 lakh (plain areas) / ₹1.30 lakh (hilly/difficult areas) for house construction, plus 90-95 days of unskilled labor wages under MGNREGA convergence.
application_process: Verify name in Awaas+ list at pmayg.nic.in or apply via Gram Panchayat / Block Development Office.

name: Pradhan Mantri Ujjwala Yojana (PMUY)
description: Free LPG gas connection to women from BPL households to replace unhealthy cooking fuels.
benefits: Free LPG gas connection with first refill and stove (deposit-free); first cylinder typically free.
application_process: Apply at nearest LPG distributor (Indane/Bharat Gas/HP) with documents, or online at pmuy.gov.in.

name: MGNREGA (Mahatma Gandhi National Rural Employment Guarantee Act)
description: Guarantees 100 days of wage employment per year to every rural household whose adult members volunteer for unskilled manual work.
benefits: 100 days of guaranteed wage employment per household per financial year at notified minimum wages.
application_process: Apply for a Job Card at the Gram Panchayat office. Once issued, demand work in writing/verbally to the Panchayat.

name: Sukanya Samriddhi Yojana (SSY)
description: Small savings scheme for the financial security of a girl child, offering high interest rate and tax benefits.
benefits: High interest rate (currently ~8% p.a., compounded annually), tax-free maturity, deposits from ₹250 to ₹1.5 lakh/year.
documents_required: Aadhaar Card of girl child (if available)
application_process: Open account at any post office or authorized bank branch with minimum deposit of ₹250.

name: PM SVANidhi (Street Vendor's AtmaNirbhar Nidhi)
description: Collateral-free working capital loans for street vendors and small self-employed workers.
benefits: Collateral-free loan of ₹10,000 (first tranche), ₹20,000 (second), ₹50,000 (third) with interest subsidy on timely repayment.
documents_required: Vending Certificate / Letter of Recommendation from Urban Local Body
application_process: Apply via pmsvanidhi.mohua.gov.in, CSC, or nearest bank/MFI/NBFC branch.

name: National Social Assistance Programme - Widow Pension (IGNWPS)
description: Monthly pension support to widows from BPL households.
benefits: Monthly pension of ₹300-₹500 (Centre) plus state top-up (varies by state, often ₹1,000+ combined).
application_process: Apply through Gram Panchayat / Block Office / Social Welfare Department, or online state pension portal.

name: Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojana (PMFBY)
description: Crop insurance scheme protecting farmers against crop loss/damage due to natural calamities, pests, or diseases.
benefits: Insurance cover for crop loss; farmer pays only 1.5-2% premium (Kharif/Rabi) or 5% (commercial/horticulture crops), rest subsidized by government.
documents_required: Sowing certificate / tenancy agreement (if tenant farmer)
application_process: Apply through bank (mandatory for loanee farmers, auto-enrolled), CSC, or pmfby.gov.in within the cutoff date for the season.
